title: Revocation of license
doc_html:
§180.  Revocation of license

The secretary may revoke the license of any person violating any provision of this Subpart, and thereafter no similar license shall be issued to that person.  

Amended by Acts 1974, No. 717, §1; acts 1981, No. 736, §1.
doc_text:
§180.  Revocation of license
The secretary may revoke the license of any person violating any provision of this Subpart, and thereafter no similar license shall be issued to that person.
Amended by Acts 1974, No. 717, §1; acts 1981, No. 736, §1.
